channel.title: Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery Updates
channel.description: Official Sparkle updates for the Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery app.

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
Lofree Dongle Battery 1.0.4

  • Adds Bluetooth battery support for already-connected keyboards.
  • Adds `Auto`, `Bluetooth only`, and `2.4 GHz only` check modes.
  • Shows connection type, status, and last updated time in the menu.
  • Moves `2.4 GHz` battery reading into the app process for a cleaner permission flow.
